roadmap.goal: Persist one-off items to staple library so they appear in QuickAdd suggestions for re-use

steps.name: Persist one-off to library on first add
steps.description: Extend StapleItem.type to 'staple' | 'one-off'. Add addOneOff method to StapleLibrary. Wire MetadataBottomSheet to call addOneOff when submitting or skipping a one-off item.
criteria: Adding a one-off via MetadataBottomSheet saves it to the staple library with type 'one-off'
Skipping metadata (defaults) still persists the one-off to the library
Duplicate one-off names do not create duplicate library entries
Existing staple add flow is unaffected

steps.name: Re-add persisted one-off from QuickAdd suggestions
steps.description: Make handleSelectSuggestion in HomeView respect StapleItem.type so one-off suggestions add to trip with itemType 'one-off' and saved store location.
criteria: Persisted one-offs appear in QuickAdd search results
Tapping a one-off suggestion adds to trip with itemType 'one-off' and saved store location
MetadataBottomSheet does not open when selecting a one-off suggestion
Duplicate one-offs are not added to the same trip

steps.name: Exclude persisted one-offs from checklist and preloading
steps.description: Filter allStaples in HomeView to type === 'staple' before passing to StapleChecklist. Filter staple list when preloading trips to exclude one-offs.
criteria: Staple checklist displays only items with type 'staple'
Trip preloading includes only items with type 'staple'
One-offs are not visible in checklist view
One-offs are not preloaded into new trips

steps.name: Differentiate one-off suggestions from staple suggestions
steps.description: Extend formatSuggestion in QuickAdd to append '(one-off)' label when staple.type === 'one-off'.
criteria: One-off suggestions display '(one-off)' label in QuickAdd suggestion list
Staple suggestions do not display a type label
Both types are visually scannable and distinguishable
